purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ImagingStudy.series.modality` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ImagingStudy.series.modality` 1..1 `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ImagingStudy.series.modality` 1..1 `CodeableConcept`
*  R4B: `ImagingStudy.series.modality` 1..1 `Coding`
*  R4: `ImagingStudy.series.modality` 1..1 `Coding`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ImagingStudy.series.modality` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ImagingStudy.series.modality` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `ImagingStudy.series.modality` do not cover the following types: CodeableConcept.
The mappings for `ImagingStudy.series.modality` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: text.
